summary: Advanced to security stage. Implemented: (1) Input validation - ReviewBase rating 1-5 constraint + XSS sanitization in comments + 500 char limit; (2) Password strength validation - min 8 chars, must have letter and digit; (3) Email format validation with regex; (4) Protected POST /api/locations, PATCH /api/locations/:id, POST /api/reviews with auth requirement (A01 Broken Access Control fix); (5) Pinned critical dependency versions in requirements.txt; (6) Added 11 new security tests covering A01, A03 injection/XSS, A07 auth. Total: 177 server + 2512 client = 2689 tests passing.
next_action: Security stage complete at 97/100 (threshold 95). Project ready for done stage. All OWASP Top 10 key vectors addressed.
